briefdescription.para: Creates a LottieAnimationVisual object.

simplesect.para: The newly created lottie animation visual object.

briefdescription.para: Gets the resource url of the LottieAnimationVisual.

simplesect.para: The resource url of the LottieAnimationVisual

briefdescription.para: Sets the resource url of the LottieAnimationVisual.
Gets whether synchronous loading is enabled.

simplesect.para: True if synchronous loading is enabled

briefdescription.para: Sets whether the image is loaded synchronously.

parameterdescription.para: True to load the image on the main thread synchronously

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets the desired width of the LottieAnimationVisual.

simplesect.para: The desired width of the LottieAnimationVisual

briefdescription.para: Sets the desired width of the LottieAnimationVisual.

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets the desired height of the LottieAnimationVisual.

simplesect.para: The desired height of the LottieAnimationVisual

briefdescription.para: Sets the desired height of the LottieAnimationVisual.

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets the sampling mode of the LottieAnimationVisual.

simplesect.para: The sampling mode of the LottieAnimationVisual

briefdescription.para: Sets the sampling mode of the LottieAnimationVisual.

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets the pixel area of the LottieAnimationVisual.

simplesect.para: The pixel area of the LottieAnimationVisual

briefdescription.para: Sets the pixel area of the LottieAnimationVisual.

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets the wrap mode for u coordinate of the LottieAnimationVisual.

simplesect.para: The wrap mode for u coordinate of the LottieAnimationVisual

briefdescription.para: Sets the wrap mode for u coordinate of the LottieAnimationVisual.

parameterdescription.para: The wrap mode for u coordinate to set

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets the wrap mode for v coordinate of the LottieAnimationVisual.

simplesect.para: The wrap mode for v coordinate of the LottieAnimationVisual

briefdescription.para: Sets the wrap mode for v coordinate of the LottieAnimationVisual.

parameterdescription.para: The wrap mode for v coordinate to set

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets whether broken image is enabled.

simplesect.para: True if broken image is enabled

briefdescription.para: Sets whether to enable broken image.

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets the load policy of the LottieAnimationVisual.

simplesect.para: The load policy of the LottieAnimationVisual

briefdescription.para: Sets the load policy of the LottieAnimationVisual.

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets the release policy of the LottieAnimationVisual.

simplesect.para: The release policy of the LottieAnimationVisual

briefdescription.para: Sets the release policy of the LottieAnimationVisual.

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets whether orientation correction is enabled.

simplesect.para: True if orientation correction is enabled

briefdescription.para: Sets whether to correct the image orientation.

parameterdescription.para: True to correct the image orientation

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets whether synchronous sizing is enabled.

simplesect.para: True if synchronous sizing is enabled

briefdescription.para: Sets whether to use synchronous sizing.

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets the loop count of the LottieAnimationVisual.

simplesect.para: The loop count of the LottieAnimationVisual

briefdescription.para: Sets the loop count of the LottieAnimationVisual.

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets the play range of the LottieAnimationVisual.

simplesect.para: The play range of the LottieAnimationVisual

briefdescription.para: Sets the play range of the LottieAnimationVisual.

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets the stop behavior of the LottieAnimationVisual.

simplesect.para: The stop behavior of the LottieAnimationVisual

briefdescription.para: Sets the stop behavior of the LottieAnimationVisual.

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets the frame speed factor of the LottieAnimationVisual.

simplesect.para: The frame speed factor of the LottieAnimationVisual

briefdescription.para: Sets the frame speed factor of the LottieAnimationVisual.

parameterdescription.para: The frame speed factor to set

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets the looping mode of the LottieAnimationVisual.

simplesect.para: The looping mode of the LottieAnimationVisual

briefdescription.para: Sets the looping mode of the LottieAnimationVisual.

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets whether redraw in scaling down is enabled.

simplesect.para: True if redraw in scaling down is enabled

briefdescription.para: Sets whether to redraw when the visual is scaled down.

parameterdescription.para: True to redraw when scaled down

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets whether redraw in scaling up is enabled.

simplesect.para: True if redraw in scaling up is enabled

briefdescription.para: Sets whether to redraw when the visual is scaled up.

parameterdescription.para: True to redraw when scaled up

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets whether frame cache is enabled.

simplesect.para: True if frame cache is enabled

briefdescription.para: Sets whether to enable frame cache.

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets whether notify after rasterization is enabled.

simplesect.para: True if notify after rasterization is enabled

briefdescription.para: Sets whether to notify after rasterization.

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets the render scale of the LottieAnimationVisual.

simplesect.para: The render scale of the LottieAnimationVisual

briefdescription.para: Sets the render scale of the LottieAnimationVisual.

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets whether aspect fit scaling is enabled.

simplesect.para: True if aspect fit is enabled, false otherwise (default: true)

briefdescription.para: Sets whether to enable aspect fit scaling.

detaileddescription.para: When enabled (default), the animation is scaled to fit within the target size while preserving its aspect ratio. When disabled, the animation stretches to fill the entire target size.

parameterdescription.para: True to enable aspect fit, false to disable

briefdescription.para: Gets the play state of the LottieAnimationVisual.

simplesect.para: The play state of the LottieAnimationVisual
This property is read-only.

briefdescription.para: Gets the current frame number of the LottieAnimationVisual.

simplesect.para: The current frame number of the LottieAnimationVisual
This property is read-only.

briefdescription.para: Gets the total frame number of the LottieAnimationVisual.

simplesect.para: The total frame number of the LottieAnimationVisual. -1 if image decode is not completed yet.
This property is read-only.

briefdescription.para: Gets the content info of the LottieAnimationVisual.

simplesect.para: The content info of the LottieAnimationVisual
This property is read-only.

briefdescription.para: Gets the marker info of the LottieAnimationVisual.

simplesect.para: The marker info of the LottieAnimationVisual
This property is read-only.

briefdescription.para: Play animation.

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Pause animation.

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Stop animation.

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Jump to specific frame.

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Sets a per-frame dynamic property callback on a specific layer/element.

detaileddescription.para: Ownership of DynamicPropertyInfo::callback is transferred to the visual.

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: This constructor is used by Dali New() methods.

parameterdescription.para: A pointer to a newly allocated Dali resource

briefdescription.para: LottieAnimationVisual is a owner of Visual::Base with Visual::ANIMATED_VECTOR_IMAGE, to render lottie image.

detaileddescription.para: It can use CornerRadius / CornerSquareness / Borderline feature.
